ftp mode passive
clock timezone UTC 0

object network inside-net

object service web-https
 service tcp source range 1 1024 destination eq https

 description all internal networks
 network-object 10.10.20.0 255.255.255.0
 network-object host 10.10.30.25
 network-object object inside-net
object-group network any-net
 network-object 0.0.0.0 0.0.0.0
object-group network nested-admins
 group-object internal-nets
 network-object host 192.168.1.50
object-group service web-services
 service-object tcp destination eq www
 service-object tcp destination eq https
 service-object object web-https
object-group service legacy-ports tcp
 port-object eq 8080
 port-object range 9000 9100
object-group protocol routing-protos
 protocol-object eigrp
 protocol-object ospf
access-list outside_in remark permit inbound web to dmz
access-list outside_in extended permit tcp any object dmz-host eq www
access-list outside_in extended permit ip any any
access-list inside_in extended permit ip object-group any-net object-group any-net
access-list inside_in extended permit tcp object-group internal-nets any object-group web-services
access-list dmz_in extended deny ip any any
access-list unused_acl extended permit udp any any eq domain
access-list split_tunnel standard permit 10.10.20.0 255.255.255.0
access-group outside_in in interface outside
access-group inside_in in interface inside
access-group dmz_in in interface dmz
object network inside-net
 nat (inside,outside) dynamic interface
